Name: BPC-157
Description: BPC-157 (Body Protection Compound-157) is a pentadecapeptide consisting of 15 amino acids. Extensively studied for its role in tissue repair and wound healing in preclinical models.

Name: TB-500 (Thymosin Beta-4)
Description: Thymosin Beta-4 fragment (TB-500) is a synthetic peptide derived from the naturally occurring protein thymosin beta-4. Studied for actin regulation and tissue remodeling in preclinical models.

Name: CJC-1295 (No DAC)
Description: CJC-1295 without DAC (Drug Affinity Complex) is a synthetic analogue of growth hormone releasing hormone (GHRH). Studied for its role in modulating growth hormone secretion in preclinical models.

Name: Ipamorelin
Description: Ipamorelin is a selective growth hormone secretagogue receptor (GHSR) agonist. Studied for its selectivity in preclinical GH research without concomitant cortisol or prolactin elevation.

Name: PT-141 (Bremelanotide)
Description: PT-141 (Bremelanotide) is a cyclic heptapeptide melanocortin receptor agonist. Studied for its CNS melanocortin pathway modulation in preclinical models.

Name: Epithalon
Description: Epithalon (Epithalamin) is a synthetic tetrapeptide. Studied for telomere dynamics and its putative role in cellular aging models.

Name: GHK-Cu (Copper Peptide)
Description: GHK-Cu is a naturally occurring copper complex of the tripeptide glycyl-L-histidyl-L-lysine. Studied for its role in collagen synthesis regulation and skin barrier research.

Name: LL-37 (Cathelicidin)
Description: LL-37 is a human cathelicidin antimicrobial peptide derived from the C-terminus of hCAP18. Studied for innate immune modulation and its immunomodulatory properties in vitro.

Name: Selank
Description: Selank is a synthetic heptapeptide analogue of tuftsin. Studied for its anxiolytic-like properties and GABAergic modulation in preclinical neuropharmacology models.

Name: AOD-9604
Description: AOD-9604 is a modified fragment of human growth hormone (hGH 177–191). Studied for its role in adipocyte lipolysis regulation independent of IGF-1 axis in preclinical models.

Name: MOTS-c
Description: MOTS-c is a mitochondria-derived peptide encoded by the 12S rRNA gene. Studied for its role in AMPK activation and metabolic homeostasis in preclinical aging and obesity models.

Name: Thymalin
Description: Thymalin is a polypeptide isolated from bovine thymus. Studied for its immune-regulatory properties and T-cell modulation in gerontological research models.
